field_meaning: IPv4 Protocol field / IPv6 Next Header field
name: IANA Assigned Internet Protocol Numbers
safe_import_rule: Import registry values as code-point mappings; do not infer service or application without traffic validation.

diagnostic_use: map resolver logs to DNS parameter names
field_meaning: DNS RR TYPEs, RCODEs, opcodes, classes, and related DNS parameter registries
name: IANA DNS Parameters
safe_import_rule: Treat DNS parameter mapping as protocol taxonomy; validate actual error with query, resolver, authoritative server, and transport context.

diagnostic_use: separate cipher-suite mismatch from certificate/path/SNI/ALPN errors
field_meaning: TLS cipher suites, alerts, extension types, groups, signature schemes, and related TLS registries
name: IANA TLS Parameters
safe_import_rule: Expert review or assignment does not imply endorsement of security; check TLS version, recommended flag, deprecation, and endpoint policy.

diagnostic_use: map user build strings to AOSP release context
separate vendor firmware build from AOSP tag
field_meaning: Build ID, platform release, code branch, branch/sync date, tag mapping
name: AOSP Build Numbers
safe_import_rule: AOSP build identity does not by itself confirm OTA eligibility, bootloader compatibility, carrier CSC, or device-specific firmware.
